name: card
visual_summary: A card UI component is a rectangular block typically containing information, images, or both. It is often used to display content in a more visually appealing way. Developers would use a card component to summarize and highlight key information on websites, dashboards, or applications.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: card
Description: A card UI component is a rectangular block typically containing information, images, or both. It is often used to display content in a more visually appealing way. Developers would use a card component to summarize and highlight key information on websites, dashboards, or applications.
Style: e.g. dark, flat, shadowed
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable, draggable
Tags: display, content, summary, visual

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
